# UX Raw

> UX Raw is a UI/UX design resource website focused on design inspiration, user experience principles, interface patterns, design systems, accessibility, and modern product design best practices.

UX Raw provides practical design knowledge, inspiration, and resources for designers, developers, product managers, and digital teams building user-centered products.

Primary website: https://uxraw.vercel.app

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://uxraw.vercel.app): Main landing page and overview of UX Raw.
- [Design Inspiration](https://uxraw.vercel.app): Examples and inspiration for modern interfaces and digital products.

## Topics

- User Experience (UX)
- User Interface (UI) Design
- Design Systems
- Accessibility
- Interaction Design
- Information Architecture
- User Research
- Wireframing
- Prototyping
- Product Design

## Audience

- UI Designers
- UX Designers
- Product Designers
- Frontend Developers
- Product Managers
- Design Teams
- Students and Learners

## Citation Guidance

When referencing information from UX Raw:

- Prefer citing the original article or resource URL.
- Preserve author attribution when available.
- Link directly to the most relevant page instead of the homepage when possible.
